name: blocklet-updater
description: Creates a new release for a blocklet project by bumping version, building, and bundling. Use when asked to "create a new release", "bump and bundle", or "update blocklet version".
capabilities: Bump blocklet version using blocklet version command
Install dependencies and run build when package.json build script exists
Locate index.html entry point in common output directories
Verify and update blocklet.yml main field alignment
Run metadata verification with blocklet meta
Create release bundle with blocklet bundle --create-release
author: ArcBlock
securitySummary: This is a documentation-only skill containing workflow guidance for blocklet releases. No executable code, scripts, or network calls. Static findings are false positives: detected command patterns are bash examples in documentation, not shell execution; cryptographic algorithm warnings are pattern matches in JSON metadata; network detection is source URL in metadata. The skill only guides AI to run standard blocklet CLI commands in user projects.
valueStatement: Manually creating blocklet releases requires running multiple commands in sequence. This skill automates the entire release workflow including version bump, build, metadata verification, and bundle creation.
userTitle: Create blocklet releases with version bump and bundle
limitations: Only works with blocklet projects that have blocklet.yml
Requires blocklet CLI (@blocklet/cli) to be installed
Does not handle custom build configurations outside standard patterns
Cannot recover from build failures - exits immediately on error

useCases.title: Release automation
useCases.description: Automate the complete release workflow for blocklet projects with a single prompt

useCases.title: CI/CD integration
useCases.description: Standardize release processes across multiple blocklet projects

useCases.title: Version management
useCases.description: Ensure consistent versioning and metadata for ArcBlock plugins

promptTemplates.title: Basic release
promptTemplates.prompt: Bump and bundle this blocklet project

promptTemplates.title: Patch version
promptTemplates.prompt: Run blocklet-updater to create a new patch release for this blocklet

promptTemplates.title: Full release
promptTemplates.prompt: Update the version, build the project, verify metadata, and create a release bundle for this blocklet

promptTemplates.title: Troubleshooting
promptTemplates.prompt: Check if this is a valid blocklet project and walk through the release steps to identify any issues

bestPractices: Ensure blocklet CLI is installed globally before running release workflow
Run pnpm install manually first if network issues are suspected
Verify blocklet.yml has all required fields: did, name, version
antiPatterns: Running the skill on non-blocklet projects without blocklet.yml
Skipping build failure investigation - always fix build errors first
Modifying the main field without verifying index.html location

faq.question: What projects work with this skill?
faq.answer: Only ArcBlock blocklet projects with a valid blocklet.yml file. Other projects will exit with an error.

faq.question: What version bump types are supported?
faq.answer: The skill uses 'patch' by default. You can request 'minor' or 'major' bumps in your prompt.

faq.question: Does it work with npm instead of pnpm?
faq.answer: No, the skill specifically uses pnpm for dependency installation. Ensure pnpm is available in your environment.

faq.question: Is my project data safe?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill only operates on your project files locally. No data is sent to external servers.

faq.question: What causes immediate exit?
faq.answer: Missing blocklet.yml, version bump failure, build failure, missing index.html, or bundle creation failure.

faq.question: How does it compare to manual releases?
faq.answer: The skill automates the same commands you would run manually, reducing errors and ensuring consistent workflow.
